data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for tax and invoice support across pricing modes. However, the prior step evidence does not include any checks or data that confirm the implementation of this requirement. While there are successful bookings, none of the evidence points to the presence of tax and invoice handling, indicating a clear gap in the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of 'Tax and invoice support across pricing modes'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify tax and invoice support.
